title: VOS7 Query execution time estimation way off
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE kontrola (id INT PRIMARY KEY, geo VARCHAR(255), title VARCHAR(255), description TEXT);
CREATE TABLE object (id INT PRIMARY KEY, identifier VARCHAR(255), legalName VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO kontrola (id, geo, title, description) VALUES (1, 'Point(30 10)', 'Check 1', NULL);
INSERT INTO object (id, identifier, legalName) VALUES (1, 'IC-001', 'Object Name 1');
SELECT k.title, COALESCE(o.legalName, 'No Name') AS objectName FROM kontrola k LEFT JOIN object o ON k.id = o.id WHERE k.geo IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Estimated execution time exceeds specified limit
